title: polypodium × font-queri
intro: Polypodium × font-queri, also known as the Font Quer's polypody, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Polypodium cambricum and Polypodium vulgare. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and supporting digestion, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Polypodium × font-queri can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
